name: Pineapple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in milk.
5. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture.
7. Mix in the crushed pineapple.
8. Divide batter evenly among muffin cups.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Turn off the oven and let cool in the off heat for 5 minutes before removing muffins.
